metadata.description: Nika, the workflow language for AI. Author AI workflows as checkable .nika.yaml files: plan first, audit before a token is spent, verify after.

plugins.name: nika
plugins.description: Author, debug, operate and migrate AI workflows as checkable .nika.yaml files. Bundles 4 skills, 3 subagents, 2 rules, 5 commands, 3 hooks and the read-only Nika MCP oracle (9 tools). Requires the nika binary: brew install supernovae-st/tap/nika
